heading: cyAre you claiming for a specific sum of money?
maxClaimAmountLabel: cyWhat’s the maximum value of your claim?
specificFeeText:
cyYour counterclaim fee (the fee you will pay to make this counterclaim) depends on the amount you’re claiming for.

CyIf you want to check how much your fee will be, you can estimate how much it will cost you to make your counterclaim (opens in new tab)
noSpecificFeeText:
cyIf you do not know the specific sum you’re claiming for, the court needs to know what you believe the maximum value of your claim will be.

CyIf you do not know the exact amount, give an estimate.

isClaimAmountKnown.required: cySelect if you are claiming for a specific sum of money

claimAmount.required: cyEnter how much you are claiming for
claimAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount you are claiming for must be less than £1 billion
claimAmount.negative: cyThe amount you are claiming for must be £0.00 or above
claimAmount.invalidFormat: cyEnter how much you are claiming for in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50

estimatedMaxClaimAmount.required: cyEnter the maximum value of your claim
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.largeAmount: cyThe maximum value you are claiming for must be less than £1 billion
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.negative: cyThe maximum value you are claiming for must be £0.00 or above
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.invalidFormat: cyEnter the maximum value of your claim in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
